descFull: ServiceNow MCP server: 450+ tools and 26 AI capabilities for any AI (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor, Copilot). Multi-transport (stdio, SSE, HTTP), A2A, dynamic schema discovery, read-only by default. Open source. Part of the NowAIKit suite.
